top_patterns: News hooks dominate the top 3 (Ranks 1, 6) — timely, platform-relevant claims get the highest engagement
Personal stories paired with measurable, concrete experiences perform strongly (Ranks 2-3: Salesforce rollout, 8-country PMO)
TAM (Total Addressable Market) topic appears in all top 3 posts — industry-scale insights outperform generic advice
actionable_rules: Lead with a news hook or contrarian claim — 'LinkedIn just became...' or 'Most [common practice] fail...' types generate 3-5x more engagement than pure insights
Pair every insight with a personal story or specific metric — 'I built a PMO across 8 countries' outperforms abstract observations
Anchor posts in a named topic (TAM, Growth, etc.) — topical posts average 4-5x more engagement than topic-free posts
Keep titles under 15 words: one idea, one hook, no preamble. 'There's a platform tracking the entire planet' (13 eng) vs 'Intel taught me precision' (0 eng) proves brevity wins
End with a question or invite — posts with explicit CTAs for comments (hiring posts have 0 comments) need 'What do you think?' framing
